description: Clone a Git repository by URL and skip if it exists.

variables.name: agent_id
variables.description: The ID of a Coder agent.

variables.name: base_dir
variables.description: The base directory to clone the repository. Defaults to "$HOME".

variables.name: branch_name
variables.description: The branch name to clone. If not provided, the default branch will be cloned.

variables.name: folder_name
variables.description: The destination folder to clone the repository into.

variables.name: post_clone_script
variables.description: Custom script to run after cloning the repository.

variables.name: pre_clone_script
variables.description: Custom script to run before cloning the repository.

variables.name: url
variables.description: The URL of the Git repository.
